description: You are an intelligence analyst compiling a dossier. Capture unfragmented web evidence using Tor Browser. Create the directory /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/ and save a full-page screenshot of the Tor Onion Services Overview (https://community.torproject.org/onion-services/overview/) to /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/onion_services_full.png. Additionally, capture a standard viewport screenshot of the Tor Check page (https://check.torproject.org/) to /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/tor_check_viewport.png. Document both visited URLs in a plain text log file at /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/capture_log.txt to record their provenance.
